records.content_snippet:
from __future__ import annotations
import asyncio
import logging
from services.agents.base.agent import BaseAgent
from shared.schemas.message import BusMessage

logger = logging.getLogger(__name__)


class AuditorAgent(BaseAgent):
    def __init__(self):
        super().__init__("auditor")

    async def handle_message(self, msg: BusMessage) -> None:
        logger.info("auditor_received_message", extra={
            "agent": self.agent_name,
            "event_type": msg.event_type,
            "task_id": str(msg.task_id) if msg.task_id else None,
        })
        await asyncio.sleep(0.1)


if __name__ == "__main__":
    import sys
    sys.path.insert(0, "/app")
    from shared.logging.config import configure_logging
    configure_logging("agent_auditor")
    asyncio.run(AuditorAgent().start())
